added: Eleven-row qualitative SaaS vs on-prem/self-hosted deployment comparison table (processing location, air-gap, residency, ops ownership, data updates, upgrade timing, cost shape, scaling, time to first scan, failure domain, audit evidence), scrollable, placed after the Operational Considerations section

Technique-level comparison table of the four license-detection methods (package metadata, curated databases, license-text pattern matching, snippet fingerprinting) by what they read, what they depend on, whether they catch package-less copied code, and their inherent limitation, placed after the layered-approach section

License obligations table covering ten license families (permissive, Apache-2.0, MPL-2.0, LGPL-2.1/3.0, GPL-2.0/3.0, AGPL-3.0, SSPL-1.0, no-license) by copyleft scope, obligation trigger, source that must be made available, express patent grant, and attribution, placed after The License Landscape in 2026

Inline SVG flow diagram showing the artifact splitting into the advisory-matching path and the installed-state read path, converging on advisory enrichment, and the detection method determining the HeuristicUnverified vs ConfirmedInstalled tier, placed after the Confidence Tiers section

Inline SVG five-stage CVE lifecycle timeline (Discovery, Reserved, Published, Enriched, Matched) with an upstream vs your-environment ownership bracket, placed directly after The CVE lifecycle section
